Video.summary: Savor an array of delectable pastries that cater to your sweet cravings.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Pastry in Korea

Video.summary: Journey through the culinary wonders of Southeast Asia exploring a world of diverse flavors and delights.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Southeast Asian Food

Video.summary: Sample various types of Korean jeon, from seafood green onion jeon to colorful skewers and mung bean jeon.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Jeon Festival

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Jeon Festival
Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Jeon Festival
Food Kingdom: Assorted Korean Jeon Festival

Video.summary: Enjoy peanut candy, steamed tteok, honey citron rice snacks, and a refreshing bowl of Korean bingsu.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks
Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks
Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Video.summary: Enjoy beloved Korean-Chinese dishes like tangsuyuk, jjajangmyeon, and the spicy seafood noodle soup, jjampong.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean-Chinese Classics

Video.summary: Enjoy homemade chocolate, cheese almond chocolates, and colorful smile candies for a sweet Korean candy treat.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Homemade Korean Candies

Video.summary: Treat yourself to cream cheese garlic bread, dinosaur egg donuts, and mascarpone ice cream crepes.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Bakery Wonders

Video.summary: Dive into cheesy hot dogs, mozzarella cheese toast, bulgogi cheese toast, and more savory bites.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Cheese Lover’s Feast

Video.summary: Enjoy shrimp dumplings, giant drum-baked dumplings, and Korean street bread for a savory and satisfying combo.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads
Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads
Food Kingdom: Dumplings and Korean Street Breads

Video.summary: Experience the harmonious blend of Korean Chinese flavors for an extraordinary dining experience.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Korean Chinese Food Collection

Video.summary: Experience the artistry in your cup with lattes featuring intricate and delightful cream designs.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art

Image.alt: FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art
FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art
FoodieBoy : Special Latte with Cream Art

Video.summary: Experience an array of special grill courses with Tepanyaki cooking each a sizzling delight.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Special Grill Course (Tepanyaki)

Video.summary: Experience the joy of ice cream like never before with an assortment of uniquely rolled creations.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Ice Cream Roll Special

Video.summary: Explore a diverse range of sandwiches and burgers each a delightful culinary adventure.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Special Burgers & Sandwiches

Video.summary: Immerse yourself in the rich and diverse world of Chinese cuisine where an abundance of flavors await.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Grilled & Casual Food

Video.summary: Relish the flavors of the West in Korea from pasta to tapas in a dining experience like no other.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Western Food in Korea

Video.summary: Explore the world of Korean street desserts from bubble milk tea to waffles.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Korean Street Dessert

Video.summary: Dive into the delightful world of Korean bakeries where cream castella roll cakes and more await.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Bakery in Korea

Video.summary: Explore Grilled Fish, Clam Ramyeon, Spicy Octopus, and Giant Ribbon Fish Stew.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Style Seafood

Video.summary: Enjoy stir-fried sundae, chili shrimp, fishcake hot bars, and tasty omelets for a fusion experience.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Fusion Bites

Video.summary: Feast on Tteokgalbi, Budae Jjigae, Dry-Aged Meat, and the elegance of the Beef Rib Set.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Meat Product Factory

Video.summary: Unveil the secrets of crafting Gat Kimchi, Godulbaegi Kimchi, Nurungji, and Lotus Root Chips.
Video.title: Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Food Factory

Image.alt: Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Food Factory
Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Food Factory
Food Kingdom : Korean Traditional Food Factory

Video.summary: Explore tteok, hotteok, and Korean poppers for a mix of chewy and crispy traditional snacks.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks
Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks
Food Kingdom: Korean Rice Cakes and Snacks

Video.summary: Delight in fish-shaped bread, souffle pancakes, and peanut cream bread for a sweet treat.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Korean Sweet Breads

Video.summary: Enjoy long-sized pizzas, bulgogi gorgonzola, and creamy pasta dishes, plus Korea’s biggest burger.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Pizza and Pasta Delights

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Pizza and Pasta Delights
Food Kingdom: Pizza and Pasta Delights
Food Kingdom: Pizza and Pasta Delights

Video.summary: Enjoy a seafood feast featuring fresh sashimi and the bold flavors of fried shrimp.
Video.title: FoodieBoy : Seafood Dishes in Korea

Video.summary: Taste flower crepes, frozen Dubai tarts, and crispy rice chocolate for a colorful fusion dessert experience.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Fusion Desserts

Video.summary: Indulge in intense red tteokbokki, five-flavored sundae, and a selection of Jeju-style Korean snacks.
Video.title: Food Kingdom: Tteokbokki and Sundae Special

Image.alt: Food Kingdom: Tteokbokki and Sundae Special
Food Kingdom: Tteokbokki and Sundae Special
